title: Async functions should not contain synchronous file operations
description: Encourages using async file operations in async functions
message: Async function contains synchronous file operation
recommendation: Use async file operations in async functions

noncompliant.description: Async function with synchronous file operation

compliant.code:
import asyncio
async def read_file(file_path):
    async with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8', newline='') as f:
        return await f.read()
compliant.description: Async function with async file operation

why_is_this_an_issue: Avoid mixing synchronous and asynchronous code for better performance and code readability
how_to_fix: Use async file operations in async functions

checks.message: Async function contains synchronous file operation.
